value:
President & Chief Revenue Officer
Todd Jarvis is President and Chief Revenue Officer of Quantum Reality Capture (QRC), where he leads revenue strategy, go-to-market execution, and strategic partnership development with a mandate to drive rapid market penetration, displace legacy scanning technologies, and position QRC as a dominant North American provider of high-speed, high-accuracy, and cost-efficient reality capture solutions across the Architecture, Engineering, Construction (AEC), infrastructure, and real estate sectors.
Todd is a proven commercial leader with more than two decades of experience building and scaling high-growth technology companies. Throughout his career, he has consistently driven product commercialization strategies and accelerated category expansion by developing disruptive go-to-market strategies that challenge incumbents and create new market demand. His cross-functional leadership approach aligns sales, marketing, customer success, and services organizations to deliver scalable and repeatable growth.
Todd holds a Master of Business Administration from Duke University’s Fuqua School of Business and a Bachelor of Science in Business Administration from the University of North Carolina at Chapel Hill.
In his free time, Todd is an avid tennis and pickleball player, fitness enthusiast, and adrenaline junkie who enjoys traveling and spending time with family and friends.
